entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange represented by the catex.io trading domain and major exchange directories. HEI keeps jurisdiction and launch date unset because this review did not recover sufficiently strong first-party markers for those fields.
entity.notes: Two candidate source rows are collapsed into this entity. The official domain resolves, but this batch does not claim a jurisdiction or exact launch date without stronger evidence.

evidence.title: Catex official exchange website
evidence.notes: First-party trading domain used as the current service identity reference.

evidence.title: Catex exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory reference used to corroborate the Catex exchange identity.
